scripts.build:verification: node -e "const fs=require('node:fs');const path=require('node:path');const ts=require('typescript');const files=['30_app/importer/mystery-garden/map-evidence-to-project.ts','30_app/importer/mystery-garden/cli.ts','50_tests/schema/validate-workspace.ts','50_tests/schema/validate-project_001.ts','50_tests/replay/replay-assertions.ts'];const options={module:ts.ModuleKind.CommonJS,target:ts.ScriptTarget.ES2022,moduleResolution:ts.ModuleResolutionKind.NodeJs,esModuleInterop:true,allowSyntheticDefaultImports:true,resolveJsonModule:true,strict:true,skipLibCheck:true,types:['node']};for(const file of files){const source=fs.readFileSync(file,'utf8');const out=ts.transpileModule(source,{compilerOptions:options,fileName:file}).outputText;const outFile=path.join('dist',file.replace(/\.ts$/,'.js'));fs.mkdirSync(path.dirname(outFile),{recursive:true});fs.writeFileSync(outFile,out);} "
scripts.verify:project_001: npm run build:verification && node dist/30_app/importer/mystery-garden/cli.js && node dist/50_tests/schema/validate-project_001.js && node dist/50_tests/replay/replay-assertions.js
